scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test:run && npm run test:assets && npm run test:offline && npm run test:visual && godot4 --headless --log-file /tmp/recipes-godot-headless.log --path client --quit-after 5
scripts.test:offline: godot4 --headless --log-file /tmp/recipes-offline-smoke.log --path client --script res://scripts/offline_smoke.gd && godot4 --headless --log-file /tmp/recipes-offline-regression.log --path client --script res://scripts/offline_regression.gd
scripts.test:visual: godot4 --headless --log-file /tmp/recipes-table-visual-smoke.log --path client --script res://scripts/table_visual_smoke.gd && godot4 --headless --log-file /tmp/recipes-main-layout-smoke.log --path client --script res://scripts/main_layout_smoke.gd
